tasks.subject: Task 0: Cached TMDB person-filmography lookup (getOrFetchPersonCredits)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `getOrFetchPersonCredits(pubClient, personId, headers)` to server/redisUtils.js, mirroring getOrFetchCredits, returning `{ movies: [{ id, title, year, popularity }] }`.

**Files:** Modify server/redisUtils.js (insert after getOrFetchCredits which ends L192, before SUBMIT_LOCK_RELEASE_SCRIPT L194; add to module.exports). Create server/redisUtils.personcredits.test.js.

**Key facts:** key `personcredits:v1:{personId}`; NX stampede lock `${cacheKey}:fetching` {NX:true,EX:10}; 7-day TTL {EX:604800}; TMDB GET https://api.themoviedb.org/3/person/{personId}/movie_credits?language=en-US with AbortSignal.timeout(TMDB_FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS); non-ok → drain arrayBuffer() then throw `TMDB person credits failed: {status}`; strip raw.cast → {id,title,year:(release_date||'').split('-')[0]||'',popularity:number||0}, skip entries missing id or title. Cache-hit fast path + 250ms wait-retry stampede path (exact mirror of getOrFetchCredits L126-192).

**Verify:** `npx jest server/redisUtils.personcredits.test.js` PASS; `npm test` green; coverage floors hold.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/redisUtils.js", "server/redisUtils.personcredits.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server/redisUtils.personcredits.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["personcredits:v1:{id} key, NX lock EX:10, 7d TTL EX:604800", "GET /person/{id}/movie_credits with AbortSignal.timeout", "non-ok drains body then throws", "strips to {movies:[{id,title,year,popularity}]}, skips id/title-less", "cache-hit + stampede-wait paths; exported", "npm test green, coverage floors held"], "reviewModel": "cheap"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: BOT_DIFFICULTIES table + createBot factory
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create server/systems/botSystem.js with the difficulty parameter table (strict 0<whiff<1, monotonic easy>normal>hard) and a createBot factory producing a socketless room.players[] entry.

**Files:** Create server/systems/botSystem.js, server/systems/botSystem.test.js.

**Key facts:** BOT_DIFFICULTIES = { easy:{whiff:0.45,delayMinMs:4000,delayMaxMs:9000,popularityFloor:20,retryCap:1}, normal:{whiff:0.25,delayMinMs:3000,delayMaxMs:7000,popularityFloor:10,retryCap:2}, hard:{whiff:0.09,delayMinMs:2000,delayMaxMs:5000,popularityFloor:4,retryCap:3} }. createBot(existingPlayers,difficulty) → {id:`bot_<smallest free int>`,name:<themed, distinct>,isHost:false,isBot:true,isAlive:true,connected:true,score:0,wins:0,teamId:existingPlayers.length%2,difficulty:(valid||'normal'),stableId:null}. INVARIANT (test): every profile 0<whiff<1; monotonic; delayMin<delayMax; retryCap>=1 int.

**Verify:** `npx jest server/systems/botSystem.test.js` PASS; `npm test` green; coverage floors hold.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/systems/botSystem.js", "server/systems/botSystem.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server/systems/botSystem.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["exactly easy/normal/hard each with whiff/delayMin/delayMax/popularityFloor/retryCap", "0<whiff<1 all; easy>normal>hard; delayMin<delayMax; retryCap>=1", "createBot socketless player isBot:true stableId:null teamId parity, unique bot_<n> id + distinct name, invalid difficulty->normal", "npm test green, coverage floors held"], "reviewModel": "cheap"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: generateBotMove (TMDB person-filmography pathfinding, injectable RNG)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add generateBotMove(room, profile, deps) to botSystem.js: deterministic-with-injected-RNG selection of a valid/unused/popularity-floored/hardcore-honoring movie, or null on whiff / no move / empty first-move seed.

**Files:** Modify server/systems/botSystem.js (add generateBotMove + _shuffled + _sameActor + export), server/systems/botSystem.test.js (add describe).

**Key facts:** deps={pubClient,headers,rng,getOrFetchPersonCredits,dailySeed}. rng()<profile.whiff → null BEFORE any TMDB call (primary beatability lever). Empty chain → pick random deps.dailySeed entry → {tmdbId:entry.id,mediaType:'movie'}; empty seed → null. Non-empty: read room.chain[last].movie.cast, filter actors with id; hardcore → drop actors in room.previousSharedActors (local _sameActor: id-eq then lowercase name); _shuffled by rng, slice retryCap; per actor getOrFetchPersonCredits, filter movies: id!==lastMovieId, !room.usedMovies has `movie:{id}`, popularity>=floor; sort popularity desc, rng-pick from top<=5 → {tmdbId,mediaType:'movie'}; swallow per-actor throw → next actor; exhaustion → null.

**Verify:** `npx jest server/systems/botSystem.test.js` PASS; `npm test` green; coverage floors hold.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/systems/botSystem.js", "server/systems/botSystem.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server/systems/botSystem.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["rng<whiff → null pre-TMDB", "empty chain picks dailySeed; empty seed → null", "connecting move filters used/floor/lastId, hardcore skips prev connectors, returns {tmdbId,mediaType:'movie'}", "throw swallowed → next actor; exhaustion → null", "npm test green, coverage floors held"], "reviewModel": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: submitBotMove — socket-gate-free commit reusing the matchSystem pipeline
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Export resolveCandidates/enrichWithCredits/validateChainConnection/commitPlay from matchSystem.js and add co-located submitBotMove(ctx,lobbyId,botId,chosenMove) running the identical lock→resolve→enrich→validate→commit→nextTurn pipeline, identified by botId, no socket emits, graceful elimination on miss.

**Files:** Modify server/systems/matchSystem.js (add submitBotMove after forceNextTurn L626; extend module.exports L628-632). Create server/systems/matchSystem.botmove.test.js.

**Key facts:** pre-lock reject if !playing/isValidating/bot-not-current/!alive; acquireSubmitLock; re-read; isValidating set/clear; resolveCandidates(room,null,tmdbId,mediaType,TMDB_HEADERS) (direct-ID path, movie arg null, no typo budget); enrichWithCredits; re-read+turn re-check; validateChainConnection; no candidates/no match/throw → gameLogic.eliminateCurrentPlayer(io,pubClient,lobbyId,room,"Bot couldn't find a move") (room-wide only, eliminateCurrentPlayer L161-192 does NO per-socket emit so socketless-safe); match → commitPlay(room,botId,botPlayer,match,matchedActors,matchedActorObjects) (commitPlay scores by id findIndex L554), settlePredictions(io,lobbyId,room,'yes'), nextTurn; release lock in finally. NO socket.emit/submissionRejected/youWereEliminated.

**Verify:** `npx jest server/systems/matchSystem.botmove.test.js` PASS; matchSystem.test.js unchanged PASS; `npm test` green; coverage floors hold.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/systems/matchSystem.js", "server/systems/matchSystem.botmove.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server/systems/matchSystem.botmove.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["exports resolveCandidates/enrichWithCredits/validateChainConnection/commitPlay/submitBotMove", "submitBotMove id-gated not socket-gated, lock+re-read like submitMovie, no socket emit", "miss/error → eliminateCurrentPlayer room-wide; match → commitPlay+settlePredictions+nextTurn", "integration: 1 human+1 bot chain+score+usedMovies+advance; non-connecting → eliminate no throw", "matchSystem.test.js unchanged green, npm test green, coverage floors held"], "reviewModel": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Bot turn-hook — scheduleBotMove/clearBotTimeout + lazy-required armTurnTimeout hook
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add bot scheduling to botSystem.js (own activeBotTimeouts map, env-derived TMDB headers, defensive fresh re-read on fire, whiff→graceful-eliminate under submit lock) and hook it into gameLogic.armTurnTimeout via lazy require (mirrors gameLogic.js:528-533 lazy-require precedent).

**Files:** Modify server/systems/botSystem.js (add fs/path, _tmdbHeaders, activeBotTimeouts, clearBotTimeout, scheduleBotMove, _loadDailySeed, pubClient_getLobby; extend exports). Modify server/gameLogic.js (hook after activeTurnTimeouts.set(id,timeoutId); L71, before closing } L72; wrapped try/catch using gameLogic L7 logger). Create server/systems/botSystem.schedule.test.js (SEPARATE file — hoisted jest.mock + spyOn must not touch Task 1/2 tests).

**Key facts:** _tmdbHeaders() = {Authorization:`Bearer ${process.env.TMDB_READ_TOKEN}`,accept:'application/json'} (server.js:265 construction; armTurnTimeout has no ctx headers). scheduleBotMove(io,pubClient,lobbyId,state,opts={}): non-bot current → no-op; clearBotTimeout then setTimeout (delay uniform [delayMinMs,delayMaxMs] via opts.rng||Math.random), .unref(), stored in activeBotTimeouts; callback re-reads fresh lobby, no-ops unless playing+same bot turn+!isValidating; headers=opts.headers||_tmdbHeaders(); generateBotMove(deps) — move → matchSystem.submitBotMove({io,pubClient,TMDB_HEADERS:headers,logger:pino()},lobbyId,botId,move); null → acquireSubmitLock+re-verify+gameLogic.eliminateCurrentPlayer(...,"Bot couldn't find a move")+release. clearBotTimeout exported. gameLogic hook: try{require('./systems/botSystem').scheduleBotMove(io,pubClient,id,state)}catch(e){logger.error(...)} — non-bot unaffected, throw can't break watchdog. Lazy require breaks gameLogic⇄botSystem⇄matchSystem cycle (matchSystem/redisUtils/gameLogic also lazy-required inside botSystem callback). No top-level cycle: botSystem only top-level requires fs/path.

**Verify:** `npx jest server/systems/botSystem.schedule.test.js server/systems/botSystem.test.js server/turn-watchdog.test.js server/systems/matchSystem.test.js` PASS; `npm test` green; coverage floors hold.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/systems/botSystem.js", "server/gameLogic.js", "server/systems/botSystem.schedule.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server/systems/botSystem.schedule.test.js server/turn-watchdog.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["scheduleBotMove non-bot no-op; .unref timer; fresh re-read no-ops on turn change; whiff→lock+eliminate", "_tmdbHeaders env-derived feeds generateBotMove deps + submitBotMove ctx; opts.headers test override", "gameLogic.armTurnTimeout end hook lazy-require guarded+wrapped, WHY-comment cites L528-533 precedent", "clearBotTimeout exported; no top-level require cycle", "botSystem.test.js + turn-watchdog + matchSystem.test.js unchanged green, npm test green, coverage floors held"], "reviewModel": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: addBot/removeBot + socket events + lifecycle hardening
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Host can add/remove bots in a WAITING classic/speed lobby (cap-enforced); a disconnecting host is never replaced by a bot; a lobby with no connected humans (only bots) is cleaned up not ghosted.

**Files:** Modify server/systems/lobbySystem.js (add top-level `const botSystem=require('./botSystem')`; add addBot/removeBot after kickPlayer L322; fix handleDisconnect host-reassign L729-731 + cleanup L736-739; extend module.exports). Modify server/socketHandlers.js (on('addBot')/on('removeBot') after kickPlayer handler L301-304, lobbyConfigLimited bucket). Create server/systems/lobbySystem.botlifecycle.test.js.

**Key facts:** addBot(ctx,socket,{lobbyId,difficulty}) withLobbyLock: r.status==='waiting' else 'Bots can only be added before the game starts.'; caller isHost else 'Only the host can add bots.'; r.gameMode in {classic,speed} else 'Bots are only available in Classic and Speed modes.'; r.players.length<MAX_PLAYERS_PER_LOBBY else full msg; push botSystem.createBot(r.players,difficulty); broadcastState; socket.emit('error',rejection) on reject. removeBot(ctx,socket,{lobbyId,targetId}) withLobbyLock: waiting+isHost+target.isBot → filter out + broadcastState. handleDisconnect: replace `room.players[0].isHost=true` with `if(wasHost){const h=room.players.find(p=>!p.isBot); if(h)h.isHost=true;}`; replace `if(room.players.length===0)` cleanup with also `|| room.players.filter(p=>!p.isBot&&p.connected).length===0` → gameLogic.clearTurnTimeout(lobbyId)+botSystem.clearBotTimeout(lobbyId)+deleteLobby (player.connected already false by L718; verify ordering). Use top-level botSystem ref (lobbySystem→botSystem acyclic). module.exports += addBot,removeBot.

**Verify:** `npx jest server/systems/lobbySystem.botlifecycle.test.js` PASS; quit-grace-lock/lobby-lock/socket.integration unchanged PASS; `npm test` green; coverage floors hold.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/systems/lobbySystem.js", "server/socketHandlers.js", "server/systems/lobbySystem.botlifecycle.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server/systems/lobbySystem.botlifecycle.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["addBot host+waiting+classic/speed+cap gated, rejects emit error, pushes createBot", "removeBot host+waiting+isBot only", "handleDisconnect host-reassign skips bots (first non-bot human)", "no-connected-human lobby deleted + clearTurnTimeout + clearBotTimeout; elimination(connected) does NOT trigger", "socket on(addBot)/on(removeBot) lobbyConfigLimited; disconnect tests unchanged; npm test green, coverage floors held"], "reviewModel": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Client — Add-Bot control, difficulty selector, BOT badge, thinking cue
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lobby host sees an Add-Bot control + Easy/Normal/Hard selector (default Normal); bots render with `BOT · <Difficulty>` badge + host remove ✕; bot's turn shows a derived 'thinking…' cue. Additive CSS only.

**Files:** Modify public/js/ui/ui-render.js (renderLobby L30-~127: bot label/remove-btn in players.forEach L50-70, branch existing kick btn to removeBot for p.isBot; Add-Bot control near host/start area only when amIHost && gameMode in {classic,speed}; reuse getSocket() + Phase 4 .btn classes; thinking cue in renderPlayerSidebar ~L213 loop). Modify public/css/02-hero-lobby.css (append ONE additive block: .bot-badge/.add-bot-row/.bot-diff-select/.bot-thinking + WHY comment; NO existing rule modified — git diff additions only in this file).

**Key facts:** bot row: span.bot-badge textContent `BOT · ${Cap(difficulty)}`, no 👑; host remove ✕ emits getSocket().emit('removeBot',{lobbyId:gameState.id,targetId:p.id}) (humans keep kickPlayer); Add-Bot: select normal/easy/hard default normal + button → getSocket().emit('addBot',{lobbyId:gameState.id,difficulty:sel.value}); thinking: if p.isBot && index===gameState.currentTurnIndex && status==='playing' append span.bot-thinking ' 🤖 thinking…'. Re-derive exact element/container var names by reading current ui-render.js first (only Task 6 touches it; lines stable from main). NO new socket event. Client suite unchanged (do not add brittle DOM tests). Manual lobby smoke reported; full fun/balance is the separate post-merge playtest gate.

**Verify:** `npm test` green (client suite unchanged); MANUAL lobby smoke reported per plan Verify (host classic lobby, add/remove bots each difficulty, BOT badges host-only ✕, start 1 human+1 bot, bot turn + thinking cue, no console errors) — or report local manual not possible and defer to post-merge playtest.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/ui/ui-render.js", "public/css/02-hero-lobby.css"], "verifyCommand": "npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bot row BOT·<Diff> badge no crown; host ✕ → removeBot, humans → kickPlayer", "Add-Bot button+select default Normal only host+classic/speed → addBot", "thinking cue derived from state on bot turn, no new socket event", "02-hero-lobby.css one additive block only, no existing rule changed (diff additions only)", "npm test green, coverage floors held, manual lobby smoke reported"], "reviewModel": "standard"}
```
